summary: El resultado ordinario, sin las ganancias de Polonia y costes de reestructuración de TSB por 250 millones, sube un 15%. Anuncia otra recompra por 1.800 millones como retribución del primer semestre y logra la autorización del BCE a la compra de Webster. Reacciona en Bolsa a la baja. Leer

title: El Ibex supera los 19.500 puntos en una jornada marcada por los resultados
summary: Los futuros de los principales índices europeos anticipan una apertura con ligeros avances que permitirían al Ibex consolidar su posición sobre la cota de los 19.300 puntos que recuperó ayer en una jornada marcada por la presentación de resultados de gigantes como Santander, Iberdrola y Naturgy.&nbs

title: Which rental costs in Spain should be covered by my landlord?
summary: Whether you’re a landlord or a renter, knowing which costs you’re responsible for is essential before signing a rental contract or when unexpected expenses arise.

title: Twelve Spanish tricks to sleep better during a heatwave
summary: Spaniards are used to scorching summers and tropical nights, meaning that they're familiar with many ingenious, unwritten rules for making their homes and bodies cool at night so they can sleep better without the need for air-con.

title: Today in Spain: A roundup of the latest news on Wednesday
summary: Iberian lynx seen for first time in a century in the Basque Country, man arrested at Barcelona airport for throwing bag and shouting "Allahu Akbar" and more news on Wednesday July 22nd.

title: Spain moves to ban smoking at bar terraces, parks and beaches
summary: Spain's minority left-wing government approved on Tuesday a draft law that would ban smoking and vaping in outdoor spaces including bar terraces, parks, university campuses and beaches.

title: European countries move to ban social media for children
summary: Lawmakers in France are scheduled to vote on Tuesday to ban social media for under-15s -- one of 20 countries worldwide to have proposed or introduced such measures, with many of them in Europe.

title: Foreign residents unite after devastating wildfire in southern Spain
summary: Foreigners in the town of Bédar, one of the Almería municipalities destroyed by a recent wildfire that killed 13 people, have already begun rallying together to help rebuild their homes and lives.

title: LATEST: Another major blaze starts as Spain battles biggest wildfire of the year
summary: A huge wildfire in central Spain continues to burn out of control this Tuesday with 1,200 people evacuated, while a second one near Segovia is also of major concern.
